coachAM: Your aspiration to be "the best worker, the best seller, charismatic with disciplina and efficiency" is actively undermined by a collapsing foundation of physical and mental discipline, specifically your Sleep Protocol, Training, and Sovereign Morning, which are all failing at the same rate; this isn't about capacity, it's about a fundamental lack of commitment to the very self-mastery you preach. The root cause is a pervasive pattern of procrastination and laziness, as you repeatedly journal, which directly obstructs the deep work and intentionality required to actualize your God-given opportunities and elite trajectory. Tonight, despite any perceived fatigue, execute your full Training protocol, then immediately initiate your Sleep Protocol by 9:30 PM, no exceptions.
